plain_prefix_missing.status: PARTIAL — some reserved, some body text mislabeled

scheme_numeric.status: GAP — Scheme prefix not in figure regex

numeric_alpha_suffix.status: GAP — suffix letter lost, hyphen variants break

chinese_图.status: GAP — Chinese prefix not in figure regex

appendix_alpha.status: GAP — alphabetic number prefix not supported

vision_verified_gaps.name: Scheme N prefix not supported
vision_verified: BL8ABQ2A p2 — Scheme 1 has diagram, reserved with 0 assets

vision_verified_gaps.name: Alphabetic figure number (Figure A1/A2, Fig. A1)
vision_verified_gaps.root_cause: regex uses \d+ only for number capture, [A-Z] not recognized
vision_verified: M84CTEM9 p8 — Figure A1 caption→image (block 33) not matched as asset
M84CTEM9 p9 — Figure A2 caption→nomogram image UNMATCHED
AH6Q7DLC — expected appendix pattern, no match
vision_verified_gaps.fix: extend regex to optional ([A-Z])\d* after 'Figure ' prefix

vision_verified_gaps.name: Subfigure alphabetic suffix with hyphen (Fig. 2-A, Figs. 2-A through 2-D)
vision_verified_gaps.root_cause: hyphen + letter suffix causes partial match or doubles
vision_verified: VAMSAZMG p4 — Fig. 2-A through 2-D caption UNMATCHED, Fig. 2-C duplicated
vision_verified_gaps.fix: add hyphen+letter optional suffix as subfigure indicator

vision_verified_gaps.name: Descriptive/plain-text captions misclassified as figure_caption
vision_verified_gaps.root_cause: 67% (descriptive paragraphs + short_trash) are NOT figures — role classifier over-assigns figure_caption_candidate

baseline_performance.summary: Standard Figure N / Fig. N format works correctly for all 4093 cases across 679 papers

total_impact_estimate: ~50-80 figures with real content (caption + image) not matched across 731 papers, primarily from GAP-1 (Scheme, 28 papers) and GAP-2 (appendix alpha, 12 papers)
